mapper.select: SELECT subject_id, subject_type, subject_name, owner_name, status, created_at FROM t_account_subject ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT subject_id, subject_type, subject_name, owner_name, status, created_at FROM t_account_subject WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_account_subject ( subject_id, subject_type, subject_name, owner_name, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{subjectId}, #{subjectType}, #{subjectName}, #{ownerName}, #{status}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT account_no, subject_id, subject_name, account_type, account_status, currency, created_at, last_change_at FROM t_account ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT account_no, subject_id, subject_name, account_type, account_status, currency, created_at, last_change_at FROM t_account WHERE account_no = #{accountNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_account ( account_no, subject_id, subject_name, account_type, account_status, currency, created_at, last_change_at ) VALUES ( #{accountNo}, #{subjectId}, #{subjectName}, #{accountType}, #{accountStatus}, #{currency}, #{createdAt}, #{lastChangeAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT account_no, available_amount, frozen_amount, in_transit_amount, updated_at FROM t_account_balance WHERE account_no = #{accountNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_account_balance ( account_no, available_amount, frozen_amount, in_transit_amount, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{accountNo}, #{availableAmount}, #{frozenAmount}, #{inTransitAmount}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT ledger_no, account_no, biz_type, biz_no, direction, amount, before_balance, after_balance, ledger_status, operator_name, created_at FROM t_account_ledger ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_account_ledger ( ledger_no, account_no, biz_type, biz_no, direction, amount, before_balance, after_balance, ledger_status, operator_name, created_at ) VALUES ( #{ledgerNo}, #{accountNo}, #{bizType}, #{bizNo}, #{direction}, #{amount}, #{beforeBalance}, #{afterBalance}, #{ledgerStatus}, #{operatorName}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT freeze_no, account_no, biz_no, freeze_type, freeze_reason, freeze_amount, freeze_status, operator_name, created_at, unfrozen_at FROM t_account_freeze ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT freeze_no, account_no, biz_no, freeze_type, freeze_reason, freeze_amount, freeze_status, operator_name, created_at, unfrozen_at FROM t_account_freeze WHERE freeze_no = #{freezeNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_account_freeze ( freeze_no, account_no, biz_no, freeze_type, freeze_reason, freeze_amount, freeze_status, operator_name, created_at, unfrozen_at ) VALUES ( #{freezeNo}, #{accountNo}, #{bizNo}, #{freezeType}, #{freezeReason}, #{freezeAmount}, #{freezeStatus}, #{operatorName}, #{createdAt}, #{unfrozenAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT adjust_no, account_no, adjust_direction, adjust_amount, adjust_reason, adjust_status, created_by, approved_by, created_at, approved_at FROM t_account_adjustment ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT adjust_no, account_no, adjust_direction, adjust_amount, adjust_reason, adjust_status, created_by, approved_by, created_at, approved_at FROM t_account_adjustment WHERE adjust_no = #{adjustNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_account_adjustment ( adjust_no, account_no, adjust_direction, adjust_amount, adjust_reason, adjust_status, created_by, approved_by, created_at, approved_at ) VALUES ( #{adjustNo}, #{accountNo}, #{adjustDirection}, #{adjustAmount}, #{adjustReason}, #{adjustStatus}, #{createdBy}, #{approvedBy}, #{createdAt}, #{approvedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT event_no, event_type, biz_no, summary, payload, event_status, created_at FROM t_account_event ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_account_event ( event_no, event_type, biz_no, summary, payload, event_status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{eventNo}, #{eventType}, #{bizNo}, #{summary}, #{payload}, #{eventStatus}, #{createdAt} )
